calculation.prompt: FCF year 1 = £120k, growth 5%, discount rate 10%, terminal growth 2%. Outline DCF logic for enterprise value.
calculation.answer: Discount explicit forecast cash flows, then terminal value TV = FCF_n × (1+g) / (WACC − g_terminal), discount TV to present. Sum PV flows + PV terminal = EV. Sensitivity on WACC and g is mandatory.
